mapper.select: SELECT n.notice_id, n.writer_id, u.nickname AS writer_nickname, n.title, n.content, n.published_at, n.status, n.created_at, n.updated_at FROM notices n LEFT JOIN users u ON n.writer_id = u.user_id WHERE n.notice_id = #{id}

SELECT n.notice_id, n.writer_id, u.nickname AS writer_nickname, n.title, n.content, n.status, n.published_at, n.created_at, n.updated_at FROM notices n LEFT JOIN users u ON n.writer_id = u.user_id ORDER BY n.notice_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE notices SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId}
